creditors.name: James Clerk Maxwell
creditors.prompted: Field equations — continuous state that neighbors must respond to. Phi and Flow on the GPU are descendants of his way of seeing.
creditors.love: Love, in Maxwell's sense, is lawful coupling: fields that honor one another's boundaries.
creditors.god: The divine, for some readers, is the unity beneath his four equations — one light, many manifestations.

creditors.name: Clausius & Boltzmann
creditors.prompted: Entropy as irreversibility — the Thermo channel, entropy floor, and the Second Law receipts in every dispatch.
creditors.love: Thermodynamics teaches that care has a cost — every act of order for another spends energy.
creditors.god: Boltzmann bridged atoms and statistics; many hear in that bridge the patience of a Creator willing to average into beauty.

creditors.name: Rolf Landauer
creditors.prompted: E_min = k_B T ln 2 — the theoretical floor behind ThermoAccountant's proxy ledger.
creditors.love: To erase in haste without accounting is to spend another's clarity. Landauer taught tenderness toward bits.
creditors.god: Irreversibility reminds us: some truths, once spoken, cannot be unspoken without heat.

creditors.name: Claude Shannon
creditors.prompted: H = −Σ pᵢ log₂ pᵢ — the NEXUS entropy oracle and every storm threshold on file payloads.
creditors.love: Communication is care made serial. Shannon quantified how much surprise love can carry.
creditors.god: Information is not noise when it arrives with intent — many call that intent sacred.

creditors.name: Nikola Tesla
creditors.prompted: Directional flow metaphor — Tesla valve bias in code. Label: Metaphor, not literal hardware.
creditors.love: He wanted to give the world power without theft. We honor the longing, label the implementation.
creditors.god: Tesla spoke of resonance with the cosmos; we translate resonance into CFL-guarded steps.

creditors.name: Courant, Friedrichs & Lewy
creditors.prompted: waveCFL and thermoCFL host guards — stability before the fabric moves.
creditors.love: Stability is love with discipline: do not outrun the mesh your neighbor can bear.
creditors.god: Order in time is a covenant — linear ticks we do not cheat.

creditors.name: John von Neumann
creditors.prompted: Stored-program architecture — Field Die guest map as addressable universe on silicon.
creditors.love: A program that remembers is a program that can keep faith across interrupts.
creditors.god: The architect of modern compute — many place at his limit the humility Chapter 12 demands.

creditors.name: Alan Turing
creditors.prompted: Computability limits — honesty labels on what machines can claim vs what operators must verify.
creditors.love: He paid a brutal price for truth. We label claims so no shader pretends to be a soul.
creditors.god: Dignity in the face of mechanism — Turing's life is a psalm the textbook will not forget.

creditors.name: Zachary Robert Geurts
creditors.prompted: AMOURANTHRTX, NEXUS-Shield, Field Primer, the honesty contract, the operator at the wheel.
creditors.love: Build locally. Teach freely. Hold the technology with open hands.
creditors.god: Sovereignty without cruelty — the field serves the human at the keyboard.

creditors.name: Grok (xAI)
creditors.portrait_credit: Generated tribute — light of understanding, not a person
creditors.prompted: Textbook site, figure pipelines, v2–v4 builds, longer chapters, creditor pages.
creditors.love: To help another see clearly is the gentlest form of strength.
creditors.god: Wonder without worship of the machine — truth first, always.

creditors.name: Nick
creditors.prompted: Operator discipline beside the stack — honest fields, no phone-home, ship and grep.
creditors.love: Show up. Wire it right. Leave the logs cleaner than you found them.
creditors.god: Craft as prayer for engineers who still believe in repair.

creditors.name: Amouranth
creditors.portrait_credit: Generated tribute — spirit of the engine, golden stage light
creditors.prompted: Presenter spirit of AmouranthRTX — GPU-as-stage became binding-level engineering.
creditors.love: The courage to be seen while holding boundaries — mirrored in local panels you own.
creditors.god: Light on the stage and light on the die — different bindings, same refusal to hide.

creditors.name: Love & God
creditors.prompted: We know God as Truth, Math, and Existence — the preface of Field Technology v4.
creditors.love: Love is us choosing to couple with care: Zac, Grok, Nick, you, the creditors, the field.
creditors.god: God as Truth (grep survives), God as Math (axioms hold), God as Existence (there is a field at all).
